markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review monthly SEO performance and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Strong Organic Growth:** Non-branded impressions hit a new high, and \#1 keyword rankings jumped from 271 to 349.
  - [**Massive LLM Traffic Surge:** November LLM referrals (mostly from ChatGPT) surpassed the combined total of the prior two months.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**Strategic Content Pivot:** Content refreshes will now prioritize annual reports, with comparison content publishing in January to capitalize on LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Self-Service Expansion:** A successful Stripe Atlas pilot is prompting consideration of a wider self-service rollout, despite the high servicing costs of some customer segments.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Keyword Rankings

  - [**Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [November traffic was slightly below October due to the Thanksgiving holiday dip.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [December is off to a strong start, surpassing 1,000 sessions in the first week.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings (Google Data):**](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - \#1 Rankings: 271 → 349
      - [Top 10 Rankings: 1,450 → 2,500+](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings (SEMrush Data):**](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [SEMrush reported rank drops for "State of Michigan Business Search" keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**Context:** These articles are primarily for in-product linking, not search optimization. The SEMrush data is considered volatile and not a major concern.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Content Cohort Performance

  - [**Franchise Stats:** Clicks fell 23% vs. October. Refreshes are underway to recover performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**LLC Formations:** Clicks increased significantly.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Foreign Registration:** Clicks nearly tripled.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Engagement Rate:** All goal cohorts exceed the 50% benchmark, indicating high user interest.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### LLM Referral Traffic

  - [**November:** LLM referrals exploded, surpassing the combined total of September and October.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**December:** Off to a strong start, with one week's traffic nearly matching all of October.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Source:** ChatGPT is the primary driver, followed by Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**Top Pages:** Illinois LLC, New York LLC, Alabama annual report, Oklahoma foreign nexus.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

### Scrunch Performance

  - **Position:** Holding at \#3 for the last 12 weeks.
  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - \#1 for \>50% of tracked queries.
      - [95% positive sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [**Action:** Review Scrunch data to identify content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Product & Business Updates

  - [**Stripe Atlas Partnership:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [Drives \~300 low-value, high-servicing-cost leads/month.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [A self-service onboarding pilot for this segment has a materially higher conversion rate.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [**Self-Service Expansion:**](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
      - [A wider rollout is under consideration.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Balancing the high conversion rate with the unpredictable servicing costs and statutory obligations (e.g., OFAC checks, resigning as registered agent) of some customer segments.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mike:** Provide materials on how different verticals use Discern's product to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Prioritize annual report refreshes and publish comparison content in January.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Review Scrunch data to identify content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/Y3K-q2XE3LMQ3TEFDGJvNozXfJNwsSis?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
